---
title: "The Rev. Robert Speckott Barter"
---

## The Rev. Robert Speckott Barter

**Dates:** (1790-8 Feb 1861)

### Description

Warden of Winchester College

### Biography

A much-loved figure. [Wainewright, <i>Winchester College</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept. 30, 1868
- Letter from Decr 14th [1867]
- Letter from March 21st [1867]
- Letter from Febry 19th 1861
- Letter from 16th Febry 1861
- Letter from June 1854.
- Letter from June 9, 1854
- Letter from 8th March 1854
- Letter from February 25, 1854.
- Letter from 20 October [1850]
- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]
- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
